content:
Despite emails and chats saying the totals don’t add up for usage,  
No readings at all some days then same usage reading 3 days the same. I have no in-house reader as mine was faulty and have been told they no longer give them out, I thought this was the point of having a smart meter!!!!

Ridiculous now. Email/password, Email with code sent, come off Scot Power app to email app. Can’t open both at same time to view code to enter code on phone app. Tried copy code (to paste in box), back to Scot Power app, but can’t enter code as it goes back to email/password enter box. Also when open app, tap log in - takes me to website! As someone else it’s easier getting on a banking app than this. This is just an energy account no one else can use it really anywhere else. Try a text message code instead - I’ve used that on apps/website and the notification appears over the app/page I’m viewing.

Why do you keep advising me to have a Smart Meter when the Engineer has been to assess the situation and advised me that it is not possible to fit one!! Second review of the day. Why are we getting all these stupid games and jigsaws. All I want to do is put my meter readings in. It was much easier to do on the old version. As an 80 year old women, I found the previous version easy. This updated version is overly complicated. I only want to put my metre readings in and can’t get to the correct page.

Meter Readings

The next meterreading is due and I haven’t changed my opinion. This new version is a complete mystery to me. How do you put your meter readings in? I’ve pressed every button but no good.
I’m afraid, I’m going to have to change suppliers. I can’t put up with this every three or four months. It was so easy before. Now it’s  just confusion. 
Geraldine Bruton Customer
Great company to deal with, been with them for many years. I trust them, great communicators.
Good supply but won’t fit a smart meter
App easy to use x

Used to be fine, but now everytime it asks username password and then otp. Just use faceid for god sake. It’s utility app not banking app. It’s easier to login to my banking app than this.
Also i moved my flat, so at new place i am given different account for electricity and gas.
Unable to login for a long period due to the some issues. App has been working for a while and no longer working again
Usually good app, however since recent update cannot sign in at all on app, please sort out asap
Excellent service, lots of options to choose from the best Tariff available on the app. I recommend for anyone looking for energy, use Scottish Power 👍
Changed to The overnight Tariff, to help charge our Evs. Along with the half price weekend offer it’s making a welcome saving in these tough times.
App sends to web version which sends OTP to email but no option on the app to enter OTP
Unable to sign in, just keeps going back to log in screen after entering password 😢

This app used to be great.  Not it’s rubbish. It would tell you the energy use every day, as soon as you entered meter readings your balance updated - it just worked really well (all features). But in the last 12 months or so it has gone downhill, as if it’s being developed by primary school children and now it’s useless. Full of bugs that are never fixed, basically the opposite of what it was a few years ago.
Yearly usage comparison disappeared. I found being able to show graph of two and three years comparison very helpful. That seems to have disappeared.
Very good company. Easy to handle with our bills. 🙏🙏🙏🙏
Why do the developers continually mess with things. I am now unable to submit meter readings via the app. Very poor and so annoying
Have been with Scottish Power for many years and I’m very happy about everything to with the company👍🏻
Electric meter changed but still have to send in readings. Gas meter still old one & still have to read meter ?

This app repeatedly refuses my meter readings and I have to go on live chat to submit them. Kind of defeats the purpose of having an app. Since re loading the app (on advice from agent) it now wont accept my login details till I try to open a new account. Then it logs in. It requires an authentication to log in to the account now but the emails sometimes take more than the 5 mins they allow before they come in. Very frustrating.  Is easier to go online and login to the account without the app. Its a complete waste of time on my iphone.
I find the app incredibly easy to operate. I just inserted the meter reading and received the price for the units I had used immediately. Fantastic app very handy and easy to use 👍

The app has been good so far but suddenly it is impossible to open the meter reading page. I have spoken to someone by chat who suggested deleting and reinstalling but that’s such a hassle. What do I do, just not give readings until sorted and no, I don’t want one of these fancy new meters. I just want a working app

Generally Scottish Power’s performance is good, their App works well & the information provided is helpful in managing electricity & gas usage. 
SP’s negative is that I’ve been waiting 7 months to have my gas meter upgraded to one that is compatible with a Smart Meter.

ReDirects you to the webpage each time..

What’s the point in using an app if it only directs me to the website to enter my login each and every time ? 

I might as well be without the app and visit the webpage myself .
Everything I need in the app. Scottish Power have great tariffs and targets. Luv it 🩷
Easy online use can see all my info and compare against other months
Very good website easy to navigate
The App is very easy to use and your up to date account is shown to you within 5/10 seconds

Please let us use the app if we’re on an older iPhone im post without the the app! I can’t update my phone to your NEW required level! Not fair on us oldies with old phones! Is there anyway I can get into the app without buying a new device not fair! Please let us use the old app too
New app great to send readings

I have been using my I phone Version 7 to keep up to date with my account. Now I can’t. What a useless change. I can’t afford a new phone.I am really annoyed with a thoughtless ‘improvement’. AlistairBrockie
While I get past the username / password and passcode stage, the app then just displays the spinner indefinitely. This was after I’d downloaded the latest version of the app onto a 2025 Apple iPad.
Updated the app, now I just see a white screen and I can’t log in. Did nobody think to test this update before releasing it?

The worst app I’ve ever used to top up my phone.

It doesn’t show the real account balance — everything is delayed or inaccurate. Information appears with a noticeable lag, so you’re never sure whether your top-up has actually been processed.

There’s no transparency, no real-time updates, and absolutely no sense of control over your own money. Extremely frustrating and unreliable.
Very nice and very good
Such a great app, makes keeping track of my power usage simple and clear.

My only complaint is myself that I didn’t switch over to Scottish power sooner , exceptional customer service , and are fair , they don’t try to rip you off or over charge you , and you speak to people that can communicate with good English so there’s no language barrier, I’m always recommending this company to friends and family thank you Scottish power
Daily views aren't available anymore
Quite helpful, I must say, very stringent on security aspects
Their customer service is the worst in the industry.
App stopped working on my phone. I tried to delete the app and re-download it now I am not even able to download the app.
Customer service responding after 1 hour, meter readings not getting submitted from last 2-3 years. Have to call every month to submit readings.
Very satisfied been with the company for duel  fuel many years
I’m very happy with the service I get from Scottish Power
Good happy
Always a good service although my smart meter in house monitor doesnt seem to be fully working i wish someone would come and fix it

I’m extremely annoyed that I can no longer access the app because I have an older phone! So it would seem I’m forced to buy a newer phone just so I can access the app and get up to date information about my account and the same applies to get into the web site!! Not so inclusive.
Very helpful;

Not compatible with older IOS . Website not loading in either when you try to login, and they expect you to on time . An absolute zero rate . They haven’t paid me 521 KwH after my solar panel , makes it a dull time scammer company . I will have to report them to the Ombudsman.
Love the fact that I can earn a few pennies by helping the grid. Love my half price weekends, bake, hoover, cook, mowing, all helps Me to save money.

They demand 2FA to even send a meter reading. The passcode is sent via one of the slowest email servers on the internet, turning what should be a quick 30 second job into a painful 10 minutes of refreshing your mail app. Ridiculous.

Cannot sign in to my account ive tried everything every way very very frustrating. Every nickname i choose is taken if i writa a good review i suppose you will accept something. I shoul go to head office about this waste of time
Very easy to use the app
I have a old iPhone and don’t want to update not affordable to me and I can’t update new app. Discusting that I am not allowed to update my readings and have to accept this

AVOID at all costs.
I was charged over £3k last year for 1 months energy usage despite working away from home 5 days a week with everything turned off, my house being a 1 bed with very little energy usage when home. Meter constantly being disconnected while away working without warning defrosting my fridge freezer despite having more then enough credit, customer service advisers extremely rude.
Cannot download new app ,because it requires 16.4 update,my phone only goes up to 15.8 so that’s me stuffed,thanks ScottishPower
Want to Speek to a advisor
Keep asking for sign in, page stuck, online need another step to enter code, app don’t have the step hence keep failing to log in
Unable to access my acct since your latest update, my iPhone has its latest update. Utterly useless 👎😡
Very easy to use for everything you need.   Checking bills and payments, seeing usage of how you use electricity and gas readings.  No problems.

Have been forced to update the app to click on a notification, and you can’t log into the updated version. Just goes around in circles clicking log in and it being unable to do anything. iPhone 17 here - app issue is not related to older tech
Your ap won’t open in Culcheth

Yet again I’m experiencing from problems with my ‘smart not so smart meter. It doesn’t record the gas usage. It was replaced this year as it turned out it was faulty. Though countless Scottish power staff told me it couldn’t possibly be! Finally I got someone who could think out of the box, asked me to do a couple of tests, and yes it was indeed faulty. Come on Scottish power and get your act together.
Been with  Scottish Energy for several years with out any problems and always been there if advice needed
Rubbish app. Had my ev plugged in all night to EV optimise and it didn’t charge. Guess I will be walking to work then. 🤬
All good
Because of the stupid updates , I now have to buy new electronics to use the apps and top up my gas and electric 4 days before having a baby. No prior warning, just a joke

This is the worst experience I have ever had with a web site. 
Scottish Power have updated the app without any notification to require a iOS greater than 16.02 to run on an iPhone. My phone is at 15.8 so I cannot access my account and I do not wish to upgrade phone just for SP. I have attempted to log on using my iPad, but it will not allow to access as it stated my password has been compromised, but will not allow me to change it.
Biggest criminals going promised me my refund but instead increased my direct debit without asking me avoid at all cost
Energy Usage data page is complete fantasy- bears no relation to the actual cost and bills paid in previous and also in the current year - I keep my own spreadsheet instead

This is a has an error repetitive loop returns to update screen with out updating app. Or creating new app. For two weeks of constant same error. Have reinstalled several times only to get the same faults. You don’t deserve a star.  Create a backup Up date from registry exe file.  To overwrite error. Then update program changes in sequence of events. Come on guys get right.

This company is the worse just changed over from OVO and they still haven’t sorted my issue out I am going to run out of energy soon and my husband is vulnerable but they don’t care. COME ON SCOTTISHPOWER SORT THIS OUT
Best Tariff. A third of British Gas.

Such an easy company to use, brilliant customer service always helpful, shame they don’t do online chat like most companies as the waiting time on the phone can take a while especially if you only have a little question.
Can no longer access this due to update; now cannot top up via app. Will be moving companies.
Don’t ever change anything it’s perfect

Latest update requires IOS16 but my phone will only update to IOS 15. Update is in a loop that won’t allow me to access the system until I do the update which I can’t do. Update later should be available so I can still access my usage. Not for an energy company to dictate when I need to buy a new phone unless they are going to provide it for free.

Since your upgrade I cannot access My meter readings so your upgrade has had a negative impact on me. Will you please send someone round to read my meter. My phone is an apple I phone 6s and is 10 years old. I am a pensioner and live alone and cannot afford an upgrade
I can’t get the app to load 😢
Scottish Power have updated the app which means it doesn’t work with my iPhone 7 and as I’m 75 years old & quite tech savvy this is very frustrating.

App showing old account that I can’t delete nor can I get the new account working. The old account was closed 29 months ago and recently came back up and the new account which has been on the app for the last six months has vanished. Needing to put money into the meter which I can’t because of this and nowhere is open to do it over the counter. Chatted to bot for over a hour and got nowhere going to changing soon I feel.. 🤬

Easy to navigate, I don’t find that you need to search for information as everything is laid out well on this app. Just in general I find it to be a simplistic user-friendly app that allows you to easily upload meter readings and find your most recent bills with ease! So far so good!
Now the app has been updated I can’t use it anymore as it won’t update….
He most utterly incompetent bunch of up off merchants in the history of business. CHANGE YOUR SUPPLIER NOW!!!!!!!
Now I can’t use it at all .. I can’t download it to give meter readings etc.
The new app is terrible can’t access things I could before . Unable to opt in to power saver events

I got a call at 17:52 and they hung up on me at 17:56. This service is disgraceful; they make you feel like a thief. You start to wonder if they’re scammers because of how rude and aggressive they are. Even though I have another business account with them and pay thousands a year, I still get called 4 to 5 times a day, even after paying them. It’s shocking that I might have to leave them just because of their employees’ constant calls, which affect both my personal and professional life. I’ve never experienced such poor service as I did with Tando today, December 2, 2025, at 17:52.

I have been waiting and asking for a smart meter for 3 years still no response. I have only got one meter and they are still charging me for 2. I had to call them again on Friday morning and was told that someone would call me back on Monday morning this is now Tuesday and I am still waiting
App suggests password wrong, changed password and app won’t let me in. Now stuck in an endless loop??
Can’t upload new app update on my phone 😭

So the new app update is only compatible with iPhone iOS 16.4, absolutely disgusting, been using this app for 3 years without any issues and now it is useless to me, if this issue doesn’t get resolved soon I’ll be changing supplier as I’ve have to go to the nearest post office now (3 miles away) to top up, you can’t even use their website to top up as there’s no option for payment
Can’t login
This New Update no longer works on my phone.I am not going out to buy a new phone to use a app.So I take it we will just freeze to death.Thank you for nothing.
I have bean asked to update the app. BUT MY MOBILE DOES NOT HAVE THE 16.?! iOS to do this so now I can’t top up my electricity!

I was thought this was a really good app but just recently when trying to log into the app was told there had been an update which is not surprising because they’re always faffing Fanny in and farting about with it when I try to download the update I discovered that I wasn’t able to download it to my phone so now have no access to my Scottish Power account cannot get through to them on the phone so my only option now is to switch to another supplier absolutely appalling treatment of its customers by Scottish Power as there is no access to the old version of the app

I keep an eye on the app regularly and have found it very very helpful. But recently it keeps telling me to update it yet again & you have to do it there’s no option but it’s making me increasing fed up with it. Has anyone else had this issue recently. Perhaps Scottish power don’t want me to keep an eye on my usage & bills. I don’t mean to be rude but it’s getting frustrating. Surely we shouldn’t have to keep updating the app & then having to wait 10 minutes for the code number on an email to allow you to sign in.

Scottish power energy company is so affordable and reliable with their generous and efficient services they render effortlessly to customers like me. I’m enjoying the quality of the energy mobile app too. It consists of different functionalities that keep me updated and helps me to manage and control energy consumption.
Following a recent issue regarding having to log in everytime after an update, the problem has now been fixed.  Thank you 😊

Scottish Power is by far the worst energy company. The app doesn’t work can’t use the chat feature and when you call up the automated voice simply tells you they can’t answer your call and hang up. They earn billions a year and can’t even answer a customers call. First opportunity I get I will be switching to another provider 😋
Latest update does not allow me to log in. Just returns to the Sign In’ screen in an endless loop.

Awful app, constant faults. Incredibly stressful. Not been able to get on to it for days. This happens at least every couple of months the time before last resulting in the loss of all my freezer contents whilst I was away on holiday. I’d loaded more than enough prior to going away which because of bugs hadn’t processed. I loaded more and more. Eventually called them and they were of no use.

I use this app regularly to monitor my energy usage, adjust my monthly payments, submit meter readings etc. It’s very user friendly - easy to use & informative. This is one of the reasons I have stayed with Scottish Power.

Why am I now forced to sign in every time and then wait for a verification code? Until recently I just stayed logged in. At the very least have FaceID login functionality. Extremely frustrating.
iPhone 16, iOS 18.

I have been a customer of ScottishPower for many years and have never had any unsolvable problems.
Their tariffs are always competitive and the online app is terrific to use.
Since the last App update, I have to sign into the account and wait for a verification code every time I open the App.  Why????
Help please, since the new update the app keeps logging me out and then I can’t get back in. Having to delete the app and reinstall to get back in again. Driving me crazy.
App is awful keeps crashing so have to delete it off my phone and start again.
Very happy with service and pricing.

Used the app last night, bit slow but it was working. Next morning login failed, tried ti login again didn’t work. Uninstalled the app, installed it again, login works but it needs an email confirmation to approve login. 10 minutes later still no email.

App is great once logged in. Not sure if this is due to a recent update but it asks me to sign in every time now all of a sudden with email/password then sends me an activation code to my email. Never used to do this. It’s frustrating !

The app automatically logs you out after a couple of weeks. But when you want login back in. Holy Moly the details you entered are incorrect but when you go to the website and login oh it works your details are correct but the app nope. I’ve uninstalled reinstalled I’ve tried everything and the app doesn’t want log me in. Scottish Power needs a New I.T team
Since the latest update I m unable to switch the electric account to the gas one, I’m unable to top up
Scottish power it’s the future for ews
Was good until it signed me out and won’t let me back in, unable to reset password as you have to log in to reset it and it won’t accept the original password to log in!😡😡
Do not update as the update does nothing but break the app. Surely these updates must be tested before putting out into the wild.

Having been with Scottish power for some years now, I made a rash decision to change to another supplier.
Unfortunately this supplier had a leaving charge which came to £150; absolutely disgusting. So I came back to Scottish Power who out of all the suppliers on offer are the best! There service is excellent, the app is easy to use and your accounts stay up to date , also now you have the extra facility of choosing to withdraw any amount credit that’s built up on your account; which certainly helps your finances . I would recommend Scottish Power to anyone wanting a fare and understanding service.
I’m glad Scottish power reduced how much I pay per month by £30.
Keeps me up to date with everything
Interactive , good level of details and great user interface
App was great and useful until I got my smart meter. Information not correct and unable to submit meter readings due to its not updating correctly on the app
I’m not sure if the app ever gets regression tested before a new version is released. I can’t even see my personal details 🤦‍♂️
So much easier and clearer for meter readings etc.
I changed suppliers to Scottish Power last December and it’s the best decision I made. The customer is outstanding. The half price weekends is an added bonus I’m one happy customer thankyou

This app is buggy and does not deal properly with meters with intermittent communication. The latest version reports there is no data and asks you to enter a meter reading when going back through the daily history and coming across a day with no data. When there has not been a meter reading submitted, but the 30 minute data has been uploaded the app just averages the total and gives identical figures for the daily consumption on the days between readings, completely different from the total of the 30 minute readings.  Needs sorting.
We are really looked after very well by Scottish Power.  We thank them.  We have good service.
App is so easy to use and always helpful staff
